import api from'./api';class PRNovaService{// Certificate Management
async getUserCertificates(){const response=await api.get('/pronova/certificates/');return response.data.certificates||[];}async getCertificateDetail(certificateId){const response=await api.get("/pronova/certificates/".concat(certificateId,"/"));return response.data;}async downloadCertificate(certificateId){const response=await api.get("/pronova/certificates/".concat(certificateId,"/download/"),{responseType:'blob'});return response.data;}// PRN Wallet
async getWalletBalance(){const response=await api.get('/pronova/wallet/balance/');return response.data;}async getWalletTransactions(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;const response=await api.get("/pronova/wallet/transactions/?page=".concat(page));return response.data;}// Capimax Integration
async getCapimaxAccountStatus(){const response=await api.get('/capimax/account/status/');return response.data;}async activateCapimaxAccount(){const response=await api.post('/capimax/activate/');return response.data;}async getInvestmentOpportunities(){const response=await api.get('/capimax/opportunities/');return response.data.opportunities||[];}async createInvestment(investmentData){const response=await api.post('/capimax/investments/create/',investmentData);return response.data;}async getUserInvestments(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;const response=await api.get("/capimax/investments/?page=".concat(page));return response.data;}async getInvestmentDetail(investmentId){const response=await api.get("/capimax/investments/".concat(investmentId,"/"));return response.data;}async withdrawInvestment(investmentId,amountUsd){const response=await api.post("/capimax/investments/".concat(investmentId,"/withdraw/"),{amount_usd:amountUsd});return response.data;}async getPerformanceSummary(){const response=await api.get('/capimax/performance/');return response.data;}async getTransactionHistory(){let page=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;const response=await api.get("/capimax/transactions/?page=".concat(page));return response.data;}async syncCapimaxAccount(){const response=await api.post('/capimax/account/sync/');return response.data;}// Dashboard Summary
async getDashboardSummary(){const[wallet,certificates,performance,investments]=await Promise.all([this.getWalletBalance(),this.getUserCertificates(),this.getPerformanceSummary(),this.getUserInvestments(1)]);return{prn_wallet:wallet,active_certificates:certificates.filter(cert=>cert.status==='pledged'),capimax_performance:performance,recent_investments:investments.investments.slice(0,3)};}}export const prnovaService=new PRNovaService();
